mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) VALUES ( #{lineId}, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL )

INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) VALUES
( #{lineId}, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL )
